title: Theranos & VC fraud risks, China bans video games, Texas SB8, Apple app store, CA fires, Rogan
description:
Show Notes:
00:00 Besties recap, it's Chamath's Birthday, Callin app
08:58 What should protocol be for conferences & live events?
12:58 Fake it before you make it, the Elizabeth Holmes Theranos trial & implications for fraud in VC
31:28 China's video game ban, is it a good move?
39:34 Texas Senate Bill 8, allowing suing for aiding an abetting abortion
55:09 Apple alters their payment policies
1:03:06 Fires continue in CA, $1T of homes can't be insured & the impacts on real estate values
1:12:48 Joe Rogan & the narratives woven by the media & consumers

Download Callin: https://www.callin.com

#allin #tech #news

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including the Theranos trial, China's video game ban, Texas Senate Bill 8, Apple's app store policy changes, California fires, and Joe Rogan. The hosts also touch on the implications of these events on society and the tech industry. They share their insights and opinions on the current state of affairs.

takeaways.text: VC fraud risks are high due to 'fake it till you make it' culture
China's video game ban may have positive effects on youth
Texas Senate Bill 8 has significant implications for abortion rights
Apple's app store policy changes may benefit developers
California fires are having a major impact on real estate values
Joe Rogan's COVID-19 experience highlights media narratives
Conference and live event protocols need to be re-evaluated

quotes.text: Fake it till you make it
quotes.speaker: Unknown

sentiment.notes: The hosts have varying opinions on the topics discussed, ranging from optimistic to cautious. The overall sentiment is mixed, reflecting the complexity of the issues.

notable_moments.description: Discussion on Theranos trial and VC fraud risks
